## PixelArt Provider Package — `packages/pixelart/`

### Files created (13 files):

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| **`package.json`** | Package config with `@ai-sdk/provider` and `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` dependencies, dual CJS/ESM exports |
| **`tsconfig.json`** | TypeScript config extending the shared `@vercel/ai-tsconfig/ts-library.json`, with project references to `provider` and `provider-utils` |
| **`tsconfig.build.json`** | Build-time tsconfig (disables `composite` for tsup) |
| **`tsup.config.ts`** | Build config producing CJS + ESM with `.d.ts` declarations, source maps, and version injection |
| **`turbo.json`** | Turborepo task config for builds |
| **`src/index.ts`** | Public API: exports `createPixelArt`, `pixelart`, and all types (`PixelArtProvider`, `PixelArtProviderSettings`, `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtImageSettings`) |
| **`src/pixelart-provider.ts`** | **Provider factory** — `createPixelArt()` function and default `pixelart` instance. Configures base URL (`https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`), API key via `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var, and creates image models |
| **`src/pixelart-image-model.ts`** | **Image model** — `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3`. Handles `doGenerate()` with `style`, `pixelDensity`, and `size` settings. Posts JSON to `/images/generations` |
| **`src/pixelart-image-options.ts`** | Model IDs (`pixelart-standard`, `pixelart-hd`) and `PixelArtImageSettings` type with `size`, `style` (`"pixel" | "retro" | "8bit"`), and `pixelDensity` |
| **`src/pixelart-image-api.ts`** | Response schema for API responses (minimal zod schema) |
| **`src/pixelart-config.ts`** | Internal config type for passing URL/headers/fetch to models |
| **`src/pixelart-error.ts`** | Error response handler with zod schema |
| **`src/version.ts`** | Version constant injected at build time |

### Key design decisions:
- **Image-only provider** — no `languageModel`, `embedding`, `transcription`, or `speech` methods
- Follows the exact same patterns as `@ai-sdk/openai` (factory function, config injection, `ImageModelV3` implementation)
- Settings (`style`, `pixelDensity`) are passed per-model at creation time and sent as body params
- Provider options via `providerOptions.pixelart` are spread into the request body for extensibility
- **TypeScript compiles cleanly** — verified with `tsc --build` (0 errors in pixelart files)
